concerns.detail: Reference to specific student by given name 'haoran' combined with institution (UCB) and advisor (Pieter) constitutes a lab-specific descriptor detailed enough to de-anonymize a private individual
concerns.excerpt: pieter不能容忍学术污点怎么不把haoran开了 据说已经快闹掰了haoran马上就在ucb呆不下去了

concerns.detail: Unsupported character judgment presented as hearsay ('collaborator said this person's level is very mediocre') and sarcastic mockery regarding employment status
concerns.excerpt: 合作者表示这个人水平非常一般
